case_title: KATHLEEN RONEY VS. GOLDEN GATEWAY CENTER SPE, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-17-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-17-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF RONEY, KATHLEEN (KATIE)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-17-2015 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RONEY, KATHLEEN (KATIE) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATEWAY CENTER SPE, LLC DBA GOLDEN GATEWAY CENTER OR THE GATEWAY APARTMENTS $1,195.42 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,240.42, DEFENDANT IS TO RECEIVE A CREDIT ON THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF 456.08, AN AMOUNT WHICH DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
